title: ProposedImprovementPayload
description: A measured, evidence-backed improvement proposal. Must pass the Evaluator's shadow test before it can reach ratification.

target_failure.description: The recurring, evidenced failure this addresses.

hypothesis.description: A falsifiable claim: applying `delta` should reduce `target_failure` without regressions.

kind.description: A heuristic (lesson) or a reusable task strategy (playbook). NEVER a capability or constraint change.

delta.description: The proposed addition. Append-only in intent.

measured_benefit.description: Set by the Evaluator: failure-rate reduction on held-out historical traces.

regressions.description: Set by the Evaluator: any new failures the change would introduce.
